stories.headline: Which European nation has the best chance to win World Cup 2026?
stories.description: Europe has the most World Cup winners in the event’s history, but what are the continent’s chances at the 2026 edition?

stories.headline: Apple and Google given three months to ban nude images on children's devices
stories.description: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.

stories.headline: My drinking days are over. Here are my tips for an alcohol-free World Cup
stories.description: Sober or sober-curious? One football fan shares his tips for having a great alcohol-free World Cup.

stories.headline: Nottingham attacks inquiry revealed miscarriage of justice, stab victim's mother says
stories.description: The bereaved families of the victims of Valdo Calocane speak at a press conference in London.
